hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines approval processes by connecting provider outputs, recording reviewer decisions, preserving evidence, and automating regulatory rule updates in one unified workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance decisions depend on fragmented logs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear, auditable records of approval decisions due to disconnected review notes and inconsistent evidence tracking. This hinders operational efficiency and complicates audit readiness across risk-based approval workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates reviewer actions, decision reasons and compliance evidence into a single log, enabling VASP operations teams to maintain consistent, auditable records across risk-based approval workflows.
workflow_title: From provider checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY routes provider results through risk-based reviews, approval workflows, decision logging and evidence preservation to support clear compliance outcomes.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented decisions. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects approval decisions with reviewer records, evidence and regulatory rules to deliver a controllable, auditable compliance workflow above existing provider outputs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured decision logging, preserved evidence and controlled workflows to meet operational and bank due diligence standards from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how approval decisions are recorded with evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit trails for compliance reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected workflow that connects provider outputs, applies policies, routes reviews, manages cases, records decisions, and supports reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle approval decision logs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY logs each approval with reviewer identity, reasons, timestamps and linked evidence to support structured, auditable decision records within compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve evidence and audit trails?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs, provider results and evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, integrating their outputs into one compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding and KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, workflows, cases and reporting for comprehensive compliance management.
final_title: Structure risk-based approvals with decision logs
final_description: Review how SFTY captures reviewer decisions, preserves evidence and automates compliance workflows for VASP operational control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
